rationale: The agent successfully read all specified files (main.py, README.md, models/resnet.py), extracted the optimizer/scheduler configuration (SGD with CosineAnnealingLR, T_max=200), augmentation details (RandomCrop + RandomHorizontalFlip), and cross-checked with the README's accuracy claims.
